base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of johnny_cage — a character (playable) from 1993 mortal kombat ii. Johnny Cage — digitized-actor Jean-Claude-Van-Damme-esque fighter. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
